series_metadata.series_title: Motor Vehicle Dealer and Salvage Board Cases and New Dealer Franchise Protests.
series_metadata.series_description: This record series includes applications, criminal records, court documents, photographs, etc. that are used as evidence in an administrative hearing or protest.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain records for five years from the date the case is closed. ; Electronic: Retain records for five years from the date the case is closed., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
